final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original travel brochure trifold design for a 4-day 3-night Hangzhou tourism itinerary, floating above a cardstock surface, with a real Hangzhou city map as the background spine.

Style/medium: flat editorial illustration meets printed travel brochure design, clean infographic layout with hand-drawn map accents, inspired by high-end Japanese tourism pamphlet aesthetics
Composition: three-panel trifold brochure laid open at a slight angle, floating above a light cardstock surface casting a soft drop shadow, front cover visible on right panel, inner spread showing map and itinerary on left and center panels, slight perspective tilt for depth
Subject: trifold tourism booklet for "杭州4天3晚旅游攻略"; each panel features landmark icons with illustrated vignettes — 断桥残雪 (broken bridge at dawn over West Lake), 雷峰塔 (Leifeng Pagoda silhouette at golden hour), 灵隐寺 (Lingyin Temple gate with flying-peak stone carvings), 飞来峰造像, 九溪十八涧 (misty bamboo creek trail), 龙井村 (tea terraces with picker figure), 西溪湿地 (wetland reeds with hot-air balloon); landmark icons float above the map with subtle connecting route lines
Scene/backdrop: real Hangzhou city map (street-level, showing West Lake, Lingyin area, Qiantang River, Grand Canal corridor) rendered in muted cartographic tones as the brochure background; cardstock surface is warm ivory with subtle paper grain
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural light from upper left, warm and inviting, gentle shadow under floating brochure, airy and refined
Color palette: West Lake celadon green and ink wash grey as dominant tones, warm terracotta accent for Day 1 route markers, saffron yellow for Day 2 temple highlights, bamboo sage for Day 3 trail section, dusty canal blue for Day 4 waterway route; ivory cardstock as ground
Materials/textures: matte coated brochure paper with slight sheen on cover panel, visible paper edge thickness on folded spine, cardstock ground with fine linen texture, map layer with aged cartographic print feel
Text (verbatim): "杭州4天3晚旅游攻略" on cover panel; day labels "第一天：西湖经典游" / "第二天：禅意杭州" / "第三天：九溪烟树徒步" / "第四天：文艺收官" as section headers; landmark names "断桥残雪" "雷峰塔" "灵隐寺" "龙井村" "九溪十八涧" "西溪湿地" "宋城" as callout labels on map; route annotation "楼外楼·东坡肉+龙井虾仁" and price tags "人均150元" "320元" "180元" as small typographic details
Constraints: brochure must read as a real printed physical object floating above cardstock; map background must be recognizably Hangzhou geography (West Lake oval shape clearly visible); landmark icons must be distinct and geographically placed on the map; trifold panel divisions must be clearly visible; all Chinese text must be legible and correctly rendered
Avoid: generic tourist clip art; fantasy or non-existent map geography; cluttered overlapping text; neon or overly saturated colors; 3D render plastic look; watermark; blurry landmark icons
